class MinStack:
    """
    A stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element
    in constant time.

    All operations (push, pop, top, get_min) are guaranteed to be O(1).

import collections
from typing import Callable, Any, List, Dict


class EventEmitter:
    """
    A pub/sub event system supporting on, off, once, and emit.

    This class provides a simple yet robust event-driven architecture. Listeners
    can be registered for specific events and will be called when that event is
    emitted. It supports listeners that fire on every event ('on'), and listeners
    that fire only once and then are automatically removed ('once').

class ExprParser:
    """
    A recursive-descent expression parser and evaluator.

    Supports the operators +, -, *, / with correct precedence, parentheses for
    grouping, unary minus, and variable bindings provided via an environment
    dictionary.

    The grammar implemented is as follows:
    expression -> term (('+' | '-') term)*
    term       -> factor (('*' | '/') factor)*
    factor     -> ('+' | '-') factor | NUMBER | VARIABLE | '(' expression ')'
